novel_features.name: Suppression sync
novel_features.description: Bidirectional sync between SendGrid suppressions and an external CSV/CRM source, with dry-run preview and unified schema across the four inconsistent suppression types.

novel_features.name: Template variable lint
novel_features.description: Statically extracts {{handlebars}} from a template version and cross-checks them against a contact record or JSON payload, flagging missing or typo'd variables before send.

novel_features.name: Suppression diff
novel_features.description: Three-way diff between the local SQLite mirror, live API, and an external CSV; shows adds, drops, and drift across the suppression universe.

novel_features.name: Stats time-series rollup
novel_features.description: Pulls flat windowed stats from the API, stores them in SQLite, and computes day/week/month rollups plus WoW/MoM deltas.

novel_features.name: Bounce investigate
novel_features.description: Joins suppressions, email activity, and stats locally to produce a narrative explaining why a specific address keeps bouncing.

novel_features.name: Template version diff
novel_features.description: Side-by-side semantic diff of two template versions (HTML, plain text, subject, test data) with HTML-aware normalization.

novel_features.name: Activity tail
novel_features.description: Streams Email Activity events with rate-limit-aware polling (respects the 6/min cap), local FTS, and filters by status/from/to.

novel_features.name: Subuser rollup
novel_features.description: Fans out per-subuser stats pulls in parallel, caches them locally, and produces a single aggregated table for ESP operators managing tenant hierarchies.

spec_source: https://github.com/twilio/sendgrid-oai (bundled from 46 resource files under spec/yaml/; OpenAPI 3.1; 240 paths, 391 ops)
